title: Avoid losing asyncio tasks due to premature garbage collection
description: Asyncio tasks should be saved to prevent premature garbage collection.
message: Task is not saved and might be garbage collected too early.

noncompliant.code:
async def task(): pass
await task()

compliant.code:
async def task(): pass
task = asyncio.create_task(task())

why_is_this_an_issue: Asyncio tasks are created on the event loop and may be garbage collected when they are no longer referenced.
how_to_fix: Save the task reference to avoid premature garbage collection.

metadata.title: Avoid losing asyncio tasks due to premature garbage collection
